content: react-hook-form useFieldArray + zod: define the array field as z.array(z.object({...})) in the schema (e.g. sizes: z.array(z.object({ size: z.number(), available: z.boolean() }))), pass control+name to useFieldArray to get fields/append/remove, and never append an empty object -- always supply full defaultValues matching the object shape. This matches the project's existing pattern of one flat zod schema resolved via zodResolver, extended with a nested array for the 36-45 size grid.
